description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular body with a wood-textured finish in a light, natural tone, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The cabinet sits atop a black metal frame with slender, vertical legs and a slatted lower shelf, providing both stability and a touch of industrial style. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing office items or decor. The front and sides are smooth, with a subtle seam indicating a lift-up or hinged lid, and a small circular cutout on one side likely serves as a finger pull for opening. There are no visible handles, label holders, or external locks, emphasizing a minimalist design. This piece is well-suited for contemporary urban environments such as offices, studios, or modern home interiors.
description: A modern, wood-finished filing cabinet with a black metal frame, flat top, and minimalist design featuring a lift-up lid with a circular finger pull.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat wood-textured face, black metal legs, and slatted lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the seam of the lid and a circular finger pull, with the metal frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a seamless wood panel and the supporting metal frame beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the lid seam and finger pull from the other side.
